text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O receives tickets for the amusement
park and invites me to come.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hark... Who among us should rejoice? Yourself?
Or the attractions?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Yes, the attractions! It should come as a supreme delight that I, the Overlord, am present to enjoy them.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Exuberant swans treading through the waters
might take flight! Spinning tea cups may quicken
into a cyclone of sheer jubilation!
choice_data_list: You don't think that sounds dangerous?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, not to worry! I will manage should it come to
that.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Tarry not. Why don't we begin with the ride most
near?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We head into the building of the nearest
attraction, but then...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hyeee! S-stop, please! This mustn't... Ahhh!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How terrific! And in every sense of the word!
Trainer... save yourself!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ack!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O falls to her knees. I rush over and
help her out of the building.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: ...I apologize for losing my composure.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Never had I imagined... that within such an
enclosure there would be...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Mirrors upon cascading mirrors ad infinitum!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: So that is a "house of mirrors"... My own brilliance nearly blinded me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And you, Trainer, to be surrounded by such
multiplicities of myself... I must apologize!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Your eyes... Were they not damaged?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She seems genuinely concerned...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She seems genuinely concerned...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh, what a relief!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Though encircled by my beauty, you would still
assist in my escape...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Your utter desire to save me, made manifest...
You are full of surprises.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But such a dire undertaking surely produced dire
consequences. Do you require rest?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh. You are kind.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But, please, allow me to show my appreciation, at
least for today. Why not enjoy a peaceful ride on
the Ferris wheel?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Though it may be but a fleeting moment, my
beauty shall be for your eyes only!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Behold! My exquisite profile, gazing from the sky
upon the ground!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Opera O strikes pose after pose, yet the Ferris
wheel car doesn't wobble an inch. Talk about
inner muscle stability.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her enthusiastic presence is so captivating I can't
help but ignore the outside view our ride was
meant to offer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
So, you bolted in with your eyes fixed downward?
Yes, I think that was a sound judgment.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
An aptitude for split-second decision-making is a
necessity for trainers as well.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... I must take a lesson from your actions.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However, I'm completely at fault for this. How can
I earn your forgiveness?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: But I will! For it will not do!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I've got it! Trainer, follow me—with haste!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She takes off running, and I hurriedly follow, until
I'm led to a boat floating on the lake.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hah ha ha! Now, let your eyes feast!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
As I stand aboard this boat, yielding to the waves'
gentle motion, what results is an image too
beautiful for even a painting to capture!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Opera O continues striking pose after pose as the
boat slowly drifts atop the water.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The leisurely pace is contrasted with a rushing
sense of speed... I'm not really sure how to
describe it.
